offer.name: Hydrogel Eye Patches
offer.description: LOVELYPRO. Hydrogel Eye Patches – 10 Pairs / 30 Pairs Professional Lint-Free Under Eye Pads for Eyelash Extension Application LOVELYPRO. is the professional-grade line by Lovely US, crafted exclusively for licensed lash artists who demand precision, comfort, and consistency in every service. The LOVELYPRO. Hydrogel Eye Patches are the under-eye essential every lash artist needs. Designed to gently secure lower lashes during eyelash extension application, these soft hydrogel pads are formulated to provide a cooling sensation and a moisturizing effect to the under-eye area — helping clients stay comfortable throughout the service. Why Hydrogel? Not all under-eye pads are created equal. Unlike foam pads or tape, hydrogel patches are designed to conform to the natural curve of the under-eye area, reducing gaps and improving lower lash coverage. The hydrogel formula contains water-binding ingredients that help maintain skin hydration during the service. Clients may notice a cooling, soothing sensation — making longer appointments more comfortable. Results may vary depending on skin type and individual sensitivity. Why Lash Artists Choose LovelyPro Hydrogel Eye Patches Soft, smooth & gentle – Designed for comfort on sensitive skin 100% lint-free – No fibers to interfere with adhesive or lash placement Hydrogel formula – Helps maintain under-eye moisture during the service Cooling sensation – May help clients feel more relaxed during application Secure lower lash hold – Keeps lower lashes in place for cleaner, more precise work Flexible fit – Conforms to the under-eye contour for a consistent, non-slip grip Professional grade – Suitable for use in lash studios and salons Perfect For Classic, volume, and mega volume lash extension applications Lash artists who prioritize client comfort and skin safety Studios looking for a reliable, consistent under-eye pad Clients with sensitive or delicate under-eye skin How to Use Thoroughly clean and dry the under-eye area before application. Remove the patch from the liner. Apply the patch under the eye, securing lower lashes in place. Perform eyelash extension application as normal. After the service, remove the patch slowly from the edges. Ingredients Water (Aqua), Glycerin, Sodium Polyacrylate, Cellulose Gum, Polyvinylpyrrolidone (PVP), Aluminum Glycinate, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Disodium EDTA, Tartaric Acid. Storage & Safety Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat. For professional external use only. Do not use on broken, irritated, sunburned, or compromised skin. Avoid use if sensitive or allergic to bandages, adhesives, or peel-off masks. Avoid direct contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse with water. Discontinue use if redness, irritation, or discomfort occurs. Use immediately after opening. Do not reuse. Keep out of reach of children. Why Choose Lovely US We're one of the largest professional lash brands worldwide, trusted by over 5,000+ lash artists in North America and tens of thousands globally. Our products are carefully selected and tested to bring you the safest, highest-quality tools in the industry. We're committed to helping you enhance beauty wherever you are. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed – We stand behind the quality of every product we carry.

offer.name: Cleopatra Eyelash Extension Glue – Deep Black, 1-Second Dry, 8-Week Hold, 5 ml
offer.description: Cleopatra Eyelash Extension Glue by Lovely US – 5 ml What is Cleopatra Lash Glue? Cleopatra Eyelash Extension Glue is a professional-grade, deep black lash adhesive manufactured by Lovely US in South Korea. It features a 1-second drying time , 8-week retention , smooth balanced viscosity , and a rich black pigment for a defined, dramatic lash line. It is compatible with both classic and volume eyelash extension techniques and is designed for experienced to expert lash technicians. Cleopatra is one of the most trusted adhesives in the Lovely US lineup , valued by professional lash artists for its consistent texture, reliable bonding, and deep black finish that enhances every lash set. Key Specifications Brand: Lovely US Volume: 5 ml Color: Deep black Drying time: 1 second Retention: Up to 8 weeks Viscosity: Smooth / balanced (minimal clumping) Pigment: Rich, deep black for dramatic definition Compatible techniques: Classic and volume eyelash extensions Skill level: Experienced to expert lash technicians Country of origin: South Korea Full Ingredient List Ethyl Cyanoacrylate, Methoxyethyl Cyanoacrylate, Polymethyl Methacrylate, CI 77266 Why Lash Artists Choose Cleopatra 1-second dry time — Optimal speed and precision for experienced lash artists who need reliable, fast curing 8-week retention — Long-lasting bond that reduces client fill frequency and increases satisfaction Deep black pigment — Rich, defined lash line for dramatic, high-contrast results on every set Smooth balanced viscosity — Consistent texture that prevents clumping and allows precise lash placement Versatile technique compatibility — Performs reliably across both classic and volume applications Trusted formula — One of the most reliable adhesives in the professional lash industry, refined over years of use Made in South Korea — Professional-grade, salon-safe formulation Optimal Working Conditions For consistent 1-second curing, maintain the following environment: Temperature: 64°F–75°F (18°C–24°C) Humidity: 40%–70% relative humidity Shelf life (unopened): 6 months from production date Shelf life (after opening): Use within 2 months for optimal performance How to Apply Cleopatra Lash Glue Shake the bottle horizontally for 30–60 seconds before use to ensure proper consistency Dispense a small drop onto a glue palette or jade stone Dip only the base of the lash extension into the adhesive Apply to the natural lash with precision for a secure bond Replace the glue drop every 10 minutes to maintain freshness and optimal curing speed Professional Tips for Best Results The horizontal shake technique is important for Cleopatra — it ensures the pigment and adhesive components are fully blended before dispensing The smooth, balanced viscosity makes Cleopatra especially well-suited for detailed placement on fine natural lashes without clumping Use a calibrated hygrometer to monitor room humidity for consistent cure times Work in a well-ventilated area to minimize fume exposure during long sets Store unopened bottles in the refrigerator (32°F–41°F / 0°C–5°C) to maximize shelf life After opening, store in a sealed thermo bag between sessions Storage and Safety Store in a cool, dark place (32°F–41°F / 0°C–5°C) away from direct sunlight and heat sources Keep bottle tightly sealed and away from moisture when not in use For professional external use only — intended for individual eyelash extension application Avoid contact with eyes; if contact occurs, rinse immediately with warm water and seek medical attention Keep out of reach of children Frequently Asked Questions What makes Cleopatra different from other Lovely US lash glues? Cleopatra stands out for its deep black pigment and smooth, balanced viscosity that minimizes clumping — making it the preferred choice for artists who prioritize a rich, defined lash line and precise placement. It also uses a horizontal shake technique rather than vertical, which helps maintain consistent texture. What is the difference between Cleopatra and Royal lash glue? Both have a 1-second dry time, but Cleopatra is distinguished by its deeper black pigment and anti-clump viscosity, while Royal is the best-selling worldwide formula known for high flexibility and broad technique versatility. What is the difference between Cleopatra and Ideal lash glue? Both offer 1-second dry time and work across classic and volume techniques. Ideal has higher flexibility and minimal fumes as its key differentiators, while Cleopatra’s defining features are its deep black pigment and smooth, clump-resistant texture. What are the ingredients in Cleopatra lash glue? Ethyl Cyanoacrylate, Methoxyethyl Cyanoacrylate, Polymethyl Methacrylate, CI 77266. How long does Cleopatra lash glue last on lashes? Cleopatra provides up to 8 weeks of retention under proper conditions when applied correctly and maintained with appropriate lash aftercare. Is Cleopatra lash glue good for volume lashes? Yes. Cleopatra’s smooth, balanced viscosity and 1-second dry time make it well-suited for volume and mega volume fan work, providing precise control without clumping. Where is Cleopatra lash glue made? Cleopatra Eyelash Extension Glue is manufactured in South Korea. About Lovely US Lovely US is one of the largest professional lash supply brands in the world, serving over 5,000 lash artists across North America and tens of thousands globally. Every adhesive formula is developed and refined over 8+ years to meet the performance demands of working professionals. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed on every order.

offer.name: Diamond Series 45° Eyelash Extension Tweezers (With Band)
offer.description: Diamond Series 45° Eyelash Extension Tweezers (With Band) 5mm Made from high-quality stainless steel , the Diamond Series features a micro-textured finish on the tips — created through a high-pressure machining process that applies fine stainless-steel dust to the surface. This precision technique improves grip on lash fibers, prevents slipping, and ensures steady fan control. The 45° angled tip enables easy removal of lash bundles from the strip without damaging or separating the base. The band grip design ensures comfort, control, and reduced hand strain during extended use. Recommended for: • Picking up and placing lash extensions with precision • Working on inner corners or deep-set eyes • Forming fans by hand or directly from the strip A professional-grade tool engineered for consistent performance and accuracy.

offer.description: Clear Eyelash Extension Glue by Lovely US – 5 ml What is Clear Lash Glue? Clear Eyelash Extension Glue is a professional-grade, transparent lash adhesive manufactured by Lovely US. Frequently Asked Questions What is clear lash glue used for? Clear lash glue is used when a transparent, invisible bond is needed — most commonly for brown, blonde, and colored eyelash extensions where a black adhesive would show through and create an unwanted dark line at the lash base. Is clear lash glue as strong as black lash glue? Yes. Lovely US Clear Lash Glue provides the same 1-second dry time and up to 8 weeks of retention as comparable black adhesives. The clear formula does not compromise bond strength. Can beginners use clear lash glue? Yes. Unlike ultra-fast adhesives, Clear Lash Glue is suitable for all skill levels, including beginners, due to its 1-second dry time and medium viscosity. What is the difference between clear and black lash glue? The primary difference is color when cured. Black adhesive dries dark and is standard for black lash extensions. Clear adhesive dries transparent and is used for brown, blonde, or colored extensions where an invisible bond is required. How long does clear lash glue last on lashes? Lovely US Clear Lash Glue provides up to 8 weeks of retention under proper conditions when applied correctly and maintained with appropriate lash aftercare. Where is Lovely US Clear Lash Glue made? It is manufactured in South Korea. contact occurs, rinse immediately with warm water and seek medical attention Keep out of reach of children Frequently Asked Questions What is hypoallergenic lash glue? Hypoallergenic lash glue is formulated to minimize the risk of allergic reactions during eyelash extension application. Pure by Lovely US achieves this through a no-fume, zero-evaporation formula that eliminates the primary irritants found in standard professional adhesives. Is Pure lash glue safe for sensitive eyes? Yes. Pure is specifically formulated for clients with sensitive eyes. Its zero-evaporation, no-fume formula does not cause tearing or irritation, making it the safest adhesive option in the Lovely US lineup for sensitive clients. What is the difference between Pure and standard lash glues like Royal or Ideal? Pure has a much slower dry time (4–5 seconds vs. 1 second), lower retention (4 weeks vs. 8 weeks), and zero fumes — all trade-offs made to prioritize client comfort and safety for sensitive eyes. Royal and Ideal are designed for experienced artists working with non-sensitive clients who need faster curing and longer retention. Can beginners use Pure lash glue? Yes. Pure is one of the most beginner-friendly adhesives available. The 4–5 second dry time gives new lash artists a comfortable window to adjust placement and build proper technique without rushing. How long does Pure lash glue last on lashes? Pure provides up to 4 weeks of retention. This is shorter than standard adhesives due to the gentler formula, but appropriate for sensitive-eye clients who may also have more delicate natural lashes. Does Pure lash glue cause tearing? No. Pure’s zero-evaporation formula produces no fumes, which is the primary cause of tearing during lash extension application with standard adhesives. Where is Pure lash glue made? Pure Eyelash Extension Glue is manufactured in South Korea. area; the minimal fume formula makes extended sessions more comfortable Store unopened bottles in the refrigerator to extend shelf life After opening, store in a sealed thermo bag between sessions Storage and Safety Store in a cool, dark place away from direct sunlight and heat sources Keep bottle tightly sealed when not in use For professional external use only — intended for individual eyelash extension application Avoid contact with eyes; if contact occurs, rinse immediately with warm water and seek medical attention Keep out of reach of children Frequently Asked Questions What makes Ideal lash glue "universal"? Ideal is formulated to perform consistently across classic, volume, and mega volume techniques without needing to switch adhesives. Its medium viscosity and high flexibility make it adaptable to a wide range of lash styles, client types, and working environments. What is the difference between Ideal and Royal lash glue? Both have a 1-second dry time and medium viscosity, but Ideal offers higher flexibility and minimal fumes, making it the better choice for artists who prioritize client comfort and work across multiple techniques. Royal is the best-selling worldwide option with a strong track record across volume and classic applications. What is the difference between Ideal and Elite lash glue? Elite has a faster 0.5-second dry time and thinner viscosity, designed exclusively for expert-level artists. Ideal’s 1-second dry time and medium viscosity make it more controlled and accessible for advanced artists who want versatility over maximum speed. Is Ideal lash glue formaldehyde-free? Yes. Ideal Eyelash Extension Glue is formaldehyde-free, making it one of the safer professional adhesive options for both technician and client. How long does Ideal lash glue last on lashes? Ideal provides up to 8 weeks of retention under proper conditions when applied correctly and maintained with appropriate lash aftercare. Is Ideal suitable for sensitive clients? Ideal’s formaldehyde-free formula and minimal fume level make it a lower-irritation option compared to standard adhesives. However, for clients with known lash adhesive sensitivities, consider Lovely US Pure adhesive specifically formulated for sensitive eyes. Where is Ideal lash glue made? Ideal Eyelash Extension Glue is manufactured in South Korea. About Lovely US Lovely US is one of the largest professional lash supply brands in the world, serving over 5,000 lash artists across North America and tens of thousands globally. Every adhesive formula is developed and refined over 8+ years to meet the performance demands of working professionals. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed on every order.

offer.name: Lash Glue Booster for Eyelash Extensions
offer.description: Faster Bonds. Stronger Retention. Flawless Results. The Lovely US Lash Glue Booster is a professional-grade accelerator designed to optimize the polymerization of lash adhesive — giving you faster cure times, stronger bonds, and longer-lasting retention with every set. Applied before extension placement, it primes the natural lash surface by removing excess moisture and oils, creating the ideal conditions for maximum adhesive performance. Trusted by lash technicians who demand precision and consistency. How to Use Step 1 — Prep the lashes: Ensure natural lashes are clean and dry before starting. Step 2 — Apply the Booster: Using a microbrush, apply a thin, even layer of Booster along the natural lashes from base to tip. Step 3 — Allow to fully dry: Wait 30–60 seconds until completely dry before proceeding. Applying extensions over wet Booster can slow adhesive cure time. Step 4 — Begin extension placement: Proceed with your lash application as normal. The primed surface will promote faster bonding and stronger retention. Use sparingly — a thin layer is all you need. Storage & Shelf Life Store at: 41°F – 77°F (5°C – 25°C), away from direct sunlight and heat sources. Keep tightly closed. Shelf life: 24 months unopened. After opening: Use within 6 months. Expiration date: 11/01/2026 Made in China. For professional use only.
offer.param: adhesive accelerator, eyelash extensions, lash glue booster, lash retention, professional lash supplies

offer.name: Lash Glue Bonder for Eyelash Extensions
offer.description: Stronger Bonds. Extended Retention. Professional Results. The Lovely US Lash Glue Bonder is a professional-grade formula engineered to maximize adhesion between natural lashes and eyelash extensions. By instantly curing the adhesive once the full set is placed, it locks in the bond, reduces fume exposure, and significantly extends retention — keeping your clients' sets looking flawless for longer. A must-have finishing step in every lash technician's application routine. How to Use Step 1 — Complete the full set: Apply all lash extensions as normal before using the Bonder. Step 2 — Apply the Bonder: Once all extensions are placed, apply a small amount of Bonder to the base of the lash extensions using a microbrush. Work along the lash line evenly. Step 3 — Allow to cure: Wait 60–90 seconds for the Bonder to fully cure the adhesive. Fan gently to speed up the process. Step 4 — Final check: Inspect the set and ensure all bonds are secure before the client opens their eyes. Storage & Shelf Life Store at: 41°F – 77°F (5°C – 25°C), away from direct sunlight and heat sources. Keep tightly closed. Shelf life: 24 months unopened. After opening: Use within 6 months. Made in China. For professional use only.

offer.name: Lash Wash Foaming Cleanser – Eyelash Extension Shampoo, Aloe, 50 ml
offer.description: Lash Wash Foaming Cleanser by Lovely US – 50 ml | Aloe Scent What is Lash Wash? Lash Wash is a professional foaming eyelash extension cleanser manufactured by Lovely US. It is formulated with hyaluronic acid and amino acids to clean, hydrate, and condition lashes and eyelids before and after lash extension application. It removes eye makeup, adhesive residue, and adhesive fumes without weakening lash extension bonds. Lash Wash serves two critical roles in the lash extension process: pre-application preparation (removing oils and residue that reduce adhesive bonding) and post-application maintenance (breaking down adhesive fumes and keeping lashes clean between fills). Used consistently, it extends lash retention and improves client outcomes. Key Specifications Brand: Lovely Size: 50 ml Scent: Aloe Format: Foaming cleanser Key ingredients: Hyaluronic acid, amino acids pH: Balanced foaming formula Safe for: Eyelash extensions, natural lashes, eyelids Free From Lash Wash is formulated without the following ingredients, making it safe for sensitive skin and lash extension clients: Gluten-free Paraben-free Phthalate-free Ethylene oxide-free Betaine-free Sulfate-free Polyquaternium-free Artificial color-free Vegan & cruelty-free Why Lash Artists Choose Lash Wash Extends lash retention — Removes natural oils and residue from lashes before application, improving adhesive bonding and prolonging extension life Breaks down adhesive fumes — Post-application use neutralizes cyanoacrylate fumes that can cause irritation and premature bond weakening Hydrates and nourishes — Hyaluronic acid and amino acids replenish moisture in lids and lashes, supporting healthier natural lash growth Non-irritating formula — Gentle enough for daily use on sensitive eyelids and around lash extension bonds Does not weaken bonds — Specifically formulated to clean without compromising lash extension adhesive integrity Clean ingredient profile — Free from 8 common irritants; vegan and cruelty-free pH balanced — Maintains the natural pH of the eye area for comfortable, safe cleansing When to Use Lash Wash Pre-application (in salon): Apply before lash extension service to remove natural oils, makeup residue, and environmental buildup from natural lashes. Clean lashes bond faster and hold longer — best results when followed by a lash primer before adhesive application. Post-application (client home care): Recommend to clients for daily or every-other-day cleansing to remove makeup, dust, and adhesive fume residue. Regular cleansing is the single most effective way clients can extend the life of their lash extensions between fills. How to Use Lash Wash Dispense one pump of Lash Wash directly onto a closed eyelid Using a clean makeup brush or lash cleansing brush, gently work the foam through lashes and across the eyelid Continue until all makeup, oil, and residue is fully cleansed Rinse lashes and eyelid thoroughly with water Pat dry gently — avoid rubbing, which can stress extension bonds Professional Tips Retail Lash Wash to clients as part of a lash aftercare kit — clients who cleanse regularly return for fills less frequently and with healthier natural lashes Use in combination with a lash primer before adhesive application for maximum retention improvement The aloe scent formula is gentle enough for clients with fragrance sensitivities Store at room temperature away from direct sunlight and heat Storage and Safety Store at room temperature away from direct sunlight and heat Keep pump sealed when not in use For external use only — avoid direct contact with eyes If contact occurs, rinse immediately with water Keep out of reach of children Frequently Asked Questions What is lash wash used for? Lash wash is a foaming cleanser used to clean eyelash extensions and natural lashes. It removes makeup, natural oils, and adhesive fume residue both before lash extension application (to improve bonding) and as part of daily client home care (to extend retention between fills). Can you use regular face wash on eyelash extensions? No. Regular face washes often contain oils, sulfates, or other ingredients that break down lash extension adhesive bonds. Lash Wash by Lovely US is specifically formulated to clean effectively without compromising adhesive integrity. How often should clients wash their eyelash extensions? Lash extensions should be cleaned every 1–3 days. Daily cleansing with a gentle, extension-safe cleanser like Lash Wash is the most effective way to extend retention and maintain lash health between salon visits. Is Lash Wash safe for sensitive eyes? Yes. Lash Wash is free from parabens, sulfates, phthalates, ethylene oxide, betaine, polyquaternium, artificial color, and gluten. It is vegan, cruelty-free, and pH balanced, making it suitable for sensitive eyelids and clients prone to irritation. Does lash wash remove eyelash extensions? No. Lash Wash is formulated to clean lashes without weakening adhesive bonds. It removes surface residue, oils, and makeup without dissolving the cyanoacrylate adhesive used in professional lash extensions. What ingredients are in Lash Wash? Lash Wash contains hyaluronic acid and amino acids as key active ingredients, with a pH-balanced foaming base. It is free from gluten, parabens, phthalates, ethylene oxide, betaine, sulfates, polyquaternium, and artificial color. Where is Lovely US Lash Wash made? Lash Wash is manufactured in Canada (Prince Edward Island). About Lovely US Lovely US is one of the largest professional lash supply brands in the world, serving over 5,000 lash artists across North America and tens of thousands globally. Every product is developed and refined over 8+ years to meet the performance demands of working professionals. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed on every order.

offer.name: Cream Remover - Caramel Scented
offer.description: Cream Remover – Caramel Scented Gentle, Fast-Acting Lash Extension Remover for Professional Use The Cream Remover – Caramel Scented is a professional-grade lash extension remover designed for easy, quick, and comfortable removal. Its smooth cream formula dissolves adhesive bonds efficiently without lumps or burning sensation, leaving natural lashes clean and undamaged. Enjoy the pleasant caramel scent while delivering a spa-like experience for your clients. Why Lash Artists Choose This Remover Fast-acting formula – Dissolves lash adhesive quickly for efficient removal sessions Gentle on natural lashes – No burning sensation or irritation during removal Smooth cream consistency – Easy to apply with a micro brush for precise placement Pleasant caramel scent – Elevates the client experience with a spa-like aroma Lump-free results – Clean removal every time with no residue Professional-grade quality – Refined over 8+ years for safe, reliable performance Application Instructions Using a micro brush, take a small amount of the cream remover Evenly apply onto the surface of the lash extensions, focusing on the bond points where artificial lashes meet natural lashes Leave on for a few minutes to allow the formula to dissolve the adhesive Carefully remove with a cotton pad Rinse lashes thoroughly with water, using a facial cleanser if needed Shelf Life & Storage Shelf life: 2 years from production date (unopened) After opening: Use within 6 months for optimal performance Store in a cool, dark place away from direct sunlight and heat Ingredients Propylene Carbonate, Montmorillonite, Fragrance Storage & Safety Store in a cool, dark place away from direct sunlight and heat Keep container tightly sealed when not in use For professional external use only – suitable for individual eyelash extension removal Avoid contact with eyes; if contact occurs, rinse with warm water and seek medical attention Keep out of reach of children Why Choose Lovely US We're one of the largest professional lash brands worldwide, trusted by over 5,000+ lash artists in North America and tens of thousands globally. Our formulas have been perfected over 8+ years to bring you the safest and highest quality products. We're committed to helping you enhance beauty wherever you are. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed – We stand behind the quality of every product we create.

Key Benefits: Gentle on sensitive eyes – safe for even the most reactive clients Light cream consistency – easy to apply with a micro brush, no mess Fast-acting formula – effectively dissolves adhesive bonds in minutes Clean removal – leaves natural lashes intact and residue-free Professional-grade performance – trusted by lash artists worldwide Perfect For: Lash techs working with sensitive or reactive clients Professionals who need a reliable, controlled removal process Salons committed to the highest standards of client care and safety How to Use: Using a micro brush, take a small amount and apply evenly along the lash line, focusing on the bonding points. Leave on for a few minutes, then gently remove with a cotton pad. Rinse lashes with water and follow with a gentle cleanser if needed. Shelf life: 2 years | After opening: Use within 6 months | Storage: Keep in a cool, dark place Ingredients: Propylene Carbonate, Montmorillonite Pro Tip: For best results, apply in a thin, even layer and avoid contact with the skin.
